subject: Re: CHECKING IN

Honest , you missed a healthy homey dinner, and I would have been prod to have you here.
Hope all is well as I have not heard even your quicky responses.
Sending Bruce for a few days of skiing to Utah Saturday.  Hope you like your gift. 
what up ???
 
Marcia M.
